verse_text: Then I said, 'I will not name the name of the Lord, nor speak anymore in His name.' But His word was like a burning fire in my bones. I am weakened on all sides and no longer able to bear it.

links.context: , 7 The sad prophecies of Jeremiah were a great burden to him. On one occasion he determined not to speak them, but could not hold them back ([[JER.20:9]]). His prophecies about the destruction and burning of Jerusalem were completely fulfilled (see [[JER.38:14]]- 39:10; 52:12, 13; [[2KI.25:1]]-21).
